entity.summary: Primary decentralized exchange on the Beam gaming blockchain, providing AMM token swaps and liquidity pools through the official Beam network trading interface.
entity.notes: Beam Swap is the on-Beam-chain DEX at swap.onbeam.com and is distinct from Beamswap entity hei_ex_000370 on Moonbeam at app.beamswap.io. HEI does not use the ambiguous BeamSwap alias for this record.

evidence.title: How to swap tokens on Beam Swap
evidence.notes: Current first-party Beam support documentation directs users to swap.onbeam.com and documents the Beam Swap token-swap workflow.

evidence.title: Beam Swap current markets and volume
evidence.notes: Independent exchange metrics report current non-zero Beam-chain spot volume, active markets, and the swap.onbeam.com identity, corroborating active operation.
